CREATE TABLE test_timestamps (id INTEGER, timestamp_with_tz TIMESTAMPTZ);
SELECT id, timestamp_with_tz AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AS utc_time, localtime FROM test_timestamps;
SELECT id, localtime FROM (SELECT id, timestamp_with_tz FROM test_timestamps WHERE id = 1) AS subquery;
CREATE TABLE additional_data (id INTEGER, description TEXT);
SELECT a.id, a.description, localtime FROM additional_data a JOIN test_timestamps t ON a.id = t.id WHERE t.id = 2;
SELECT id, localtime, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_timestamps) AS total_entries FROM test_timestamps;
SELECT id, localtime, localtime + INTERVAL '1 hour' AS next_hour FROM test_timestamps;
SELECT id, localtime, (SELECT localtime FROM test_timestamps WHERE id = 3) AS specific_time FROM test_timestamps;
